# clerk_organization_permission (Resource)

Manages a Clerk organization permission.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Unique key for the permission (e.g. "app:phoenix:read").
- `name` (String) Display name of the permission (e.g. "Phoenix App Read").

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the permission.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the permission was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the permission.
- `type` (String) Type of the permission: "system" or "user".
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the permission was last updated.
